text: Glorify the Name of your Lord, the Most High,
Who created and ňĻperfectlyňļ fashioned ňĻallňļ,
and Who ordained precisely and inspired accordingly,
and Who brings forth ňĻgreenňļ pasture,
then reduces it to withered chaff.
We will have you recite ňĻthe Quran, O Prophet,ňļ so you will not forget ňĻany of itňļ,
unless Allah wills otherwise. <sup foot_note=1300>1300</sup> He surely knows what is open and what is hidden.

foot_notes.1300: Meaning, We will have you memorize the revelations and apply the rulings contained in them, unless one ruling is replaced by another.

text: We will facilitate for you the Way of Ease. <sup foot_note=1301>1301</sup>

foot_notes.1301: The Islamic way of life which brings about ease in this life and salvation in the next.

text: So ňĻalwaysňļ remind ňĻwith the Quranňļ‚ÄĒňĻevenňļ if the reminder is beneficial ňĻonly to someňļ.
Those in awe ňĻof Allahňļ will be mindful ňĻof itňļ.
But it will be shunned by the most wretched,
who will burn in the greatest Fire,
where they will not ňĻbe able toňļ live or die.
Successful indeed are those who purify themselves,
remember the Name of their Lord, and pray.
But you ňĻdeniers onlyňļ prefer the life of this world,
even though the Hereafter is far better and more lasting.
This is certainly ňĻmentionedňļ in the earlier Scriptures‚ÄĒ
the Scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
